addons.description: Paid airport transfer service: 06:00-21:00. Paid Chinese-speaking airport transfer service is provided according to the actual departure time of the guest. The price is per person per trip and requires a minimum of 2 people to book. If only 1 person signs up, the price for 2 people will be charged. Please select double when placing an order.
